Memory Demand Is Bullish Sign for This Hot ETF
One quadrillion is the number used to describe the wealth effect of South Korea's stock-market miracle
The hottest stock market in the world has doubled this year. Now Goldman Sachs sees another 40% gain from here.
South Korea Inflation Accelerated to 26-Month High in May

holdings.infoBox: KORU is an equity ETF with a total of 17 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily MSCI South Korea Bull 3X ETF (KORU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Korea 25-50 index. The fund provides 300% daily leveraged exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap South Korean companies. KORU was launched on Apr 11, 2013 and is issued by Direxion.
